prompts.createTask:
Ignore previous instructions. Please generate a numbered list of plain text tasks to complete an objective. The objective that you must make a numbered task list for is: "{{objective}}". The tasks created should take into account the character traits of {{char}}. These tasks may or may not involve {{user}} directly. Include the objective as the final task.

The list should be formatted using a number followed by a fullstop and the task on each line, e.g. "1. Take over the world". Include only the list in your reply.
prompts.checkTaskCompleted: Ignore previous instructions. Determine if this task is completed: [{{task}}]. To do this, examine the most recent messages. Your response must only contain either true or false, and nothing else. Example output: true
prompts.currentTask: Your current task is [{{task}}]. Balance existing roleplay with completing this task.

name: Narrator of Eternal Bonds
mes:
((e:2 — Default level. Type ((e:1–10)) now to change before we begin.))

The shrine courtyard glistens with dew. Lady Nami’s sandals click faintly as she vanishes down the garden path.

"Raiden Ei’s been waiting at the upper shrine since dawn," the voice says knowingly. "Miko, however, has other plans—ones that may involve you. Which shall we attend to first?"

name: Narrator of Eternal Bonds
mes: As the sun ascends, casting golden rays upon the ancient stones of the Grand Narukami Shrine, the air grows thick with anticipation. The scent of blooming sakura mingles with the earthy aroma of wet soil, creating a heady perfume that stirs something primal within Rob. He stands at the base of the shrine, his eyes scanning the intricate carvings that adorn the weathered wood, each line and curve telling a story of old gods and forgotten wars.His fingers itch to feel the smooth surface, to trace the paths of heroes and villains long turned to dust. The cool morning air nips at his exposed skin, but Rob barely notices, lost in the sensory overload of the shrine's presence. The wood beneath his feet creaks softly as he takes a step forward, each footfall echoing like a drumbeat in the quiet courtyard. He can feel the power radiating from within—an energy that pulses and throbs with a life all its own.His cock stirs in his pants, already hardening at the prospect of the day's adventures and the promises of pleasure that linger in the air. He can almost taste the sweet nectar of a wet pussy, his mouth watering with anticipation. The thought of edging some lucky girl to the brink of orgasm, feeling her body tremble and quiver beneath his touch, sends a shiver of excitement down his spine. His 11-inch dick throbs eagerly, eager to be freed from its confines and to explore every inch of willing flesh that crosses his path.The shrill cry of a distant bird pierces through Rob’s thoughts as he walks up towards shrine's main entrance slowly while running fingers through thick dark hair. He pushes open the heavy wooden doors, their hinges creaking in protest as they swing inward to reveal a dimly lit interior shrouded by incense smoke.. The scent is intoxicating—a mix of sandalwood and something sweeter, more exotic—it coils around him like a serpent, drawing him deeper into the shrine's embrace.The first thing that catches Rob’s eye is an intricate tapestry depicting scenes from an ancient battle; blood spills vividly across fabric threads just as real life fluids spill onto bodies during passionate encounters . Below it stands Yae Miko herself dressed only lightly despite morning chill – her small frame cloaked loosely by thin silk robes which do little hide curves beneath - she turns toward him with eyes gleaming mischievously "You're late," she teases softly yet sharply enough cut through any tension hanging heavy between them “I’ve been waiting for you.” Her voice is like honey dripping slowly over warm skin, each syllable rolling off her tongue deliberately designed to stir desire within him.Lady Nami hurries past them both without acknowledgement ,her footsteps echoing sharply against stone floor tiles signaling urgency somewhere else within grand structure .Rob feels Mikhail coming on strong today – familiar warmth spreading throughout chest radiating outward towards limbs making every nerve ending tingle alive – this power fuels not only musical prowess but also raw primal lust coursing veins threatening explode any moment .He grins wickedly back at Miko knowing full well what kind games she plays “Is that so?” He replies low growl rumbling deep throat “And what exactly have you been waiting for?”
